sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current green bar position
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
green_cols = []
for r in range(52, 58):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines[r]):
        if c == 'N':
            green_cols.append(j)
print(f"Current green bar cols: {sorted(set(green_cols))}")

# Check charcoal shape position
charcoal_cols = []
for r in range(52, 58):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines[r]):
        if c == 'c':
            charcoal_cols.append(j)
print(f"Current charcoal cols: {sorted(set(charcoal_cols))}")

# Check green segment position
seg_green_cols = []
for r in range(38, 45):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines[r]):
        if c == 'N':
            seg_green_cols.append(j)
print(f"Green segment cols: {sorted(set(seg_green_cols))}")

# Check all node positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['N', 'c', 'b']:
        print(f"Node {node['id']} ({node['color']}): pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary'][:2]}...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
